tools.name: duadp_discover
tools.description: Get node discovery manifest (protocol version, capabilities, endpoints)

tools.name: duadp_search_skills
tools.description: Find available skills by search query

tools.name: duadp_search
tools.description: Full-text search across all DUADP resources with optional federation

tools.name: duadp_resolve_gaid
tools.description: Resolve a GAID URI via WebFinger (duadp://namespace/path)

tools.name: duadp_publish
tools.description: Publish agent, skill, or tool manifest into the DUADP registry

tools.name: duadp_validate
tools.description: Validate an OSSA manifest against the schema

tools.name: duadp_federation_peers
tools.description: List federated peers in the gossip network

tools.name: duadp_governance
tools.description: Get node governance policies (NIST AI RMF compliance, risk tolerance)

tools.name: duadp_audit_log
tools.description: Query immutable audit log for agent actions and governance events

tools.name: duadp_agent_reputation
tools.description: Get computed multi-dimensional trust/reputation score for an agent

tools.name: duadp_submit_attestation
tools.description: Submit DID-signed attestation for agent task outcomes

tools.name: duadp_get_attestations
tools.description: Get verifiable attestation history for an agent

tools.name: duadp_token_analytics
tools.description: Get token usage analytics (cost, model breakdown, success rates)

tools.name: duadp_health
tools.description: Check node health, uptime, and resource counts
